H.2+3.name: Notorious Monster
H.2+3.notes:
* Heat Smash
* Reversal Break
* Spike
* Transition to attack throw on hit
* Low crush 9~

R.df+1+2.name: Total Vandalization
R.df+1+2.notes:
* Rage Art
* Removes Recoverable Health
* Reversal Break
* Damage increases with lower health, maximum 82
* Freezes match timer on activation and on hit
* Restores recoverable health on hit
* Transition to attack throw on hit
* Consumes Rage
* Power crush 8~

1.name: Jab
1.notes: Recovers 2f faster on hit or block (t27 r17)

1,2,1.name: One Two Body Blow
1,2,1.notes:
* Combo from 1st CH with no delay
* Combo from 2nd CH with 10F delay
* Move can be delayed by 10F

1,2,3.name: One Two Low Kick
1,2,3.notes:
* Combo from 1st CH with no delay
* Combo from 2nd CH with 3F delay
* Move cannot be delayed
* Input can be delayed by 3F

1,2,4.name: One Two Neck Breaker
1,2,4.notes:
* Heat Engager

* Heat Dash +5, +43d (+35)

* Balcony Break
* Combo from 1st CH or 2nd CH with 3f delay
* Move can be delayed 2F
* Input can be delayed by 3F

1,4,2.notes:
* Combo from 2nd CH with 10f delay
* Input can be delayed 18f
* Move can be delayed 16f
* Cancel into 1,4,2,1 with f+1
* Cancel into 1,4,2,4 with f+4
* Interrupt with i8 from 3rd block

1,4,2,1.notes:
* Enter SLS +7 +62a r13 with f
* Cancel to r9 SS with u_d
* Input can be delayed 8f
* Move can be delayed 6f

Balcony Break (CH)

1+2+3+4.name: Ki Charge
1+2+3+4.notes:
* Can't block for 5 seconds
* CH state on your next attack for 5 seconds ''(Tekken 7 and prior games)''
* 10% damage increase on the next attack for 5 seconds ''(Tekken 8 season 2 patch onward)''
* Attacks taken will be CH for 5 seconds

SNE.f,F+1+2.name: Neo Mach Breaker
SNE.f,F+1+2.notes:
* Balcony Break
* Consumes SNE
* Can not be buffered
* Chip damage 10 (30%) on block
* Strong parry, parries all mid or high attacks except charge moves, throws and unlockables 
* On a successful parry, the attack is canceled and Bryan automatically retaliates
* Unparryable with traditional parries, Asuka, Nina, etc
* Consumes 300f of Heat
* Parry state 2~10

SNE.f,F+1+2,P.name: Immortal Payback
SNE.f,F+1+2,P.notes:
* Balcony Break
* Chip damage on block (8)
* Consumes SNE

* Power crush 1~14
